title: KandyToys 12 Piece Pretend Play Ice Cream Kitchen Toy Food Set | Kids Toys
features: ENCOURAGE CREATIVITY: Develop that imagination through play pretend games; put together scrumptious meals for friends or run your own ice cream parlour, or maybe you sell donuts and sweet treats at the fair?
EDUCATIONAL: Play chef and develop an interest in cooking, help to develop beginner cooking skills and lay the basics of healthy eating. Learn some important life skills through playtime.
AID DEVELOPMENT: Help kids work on their motor skills and hand-eye coordination as they serve ice creams and other sweet treats
SAFE: The plastic pretend foods are made from a sturdy, durable plastic built to last through playtime after playtime; and they're easy for little hands to grip and hold too!
description: Product Description Kandy toys 12 piece pretend play ice cream kitchen toy food set. Safety Warning Caution. Small Parts. Choking Hazard. Suitable for Age 3+
